glarkin     2010-11-11 15:45:21 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/bzr-rewrite    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Plugin for Bazaar that provides various ways of rewriting existing
  revisions, including a rebase command similar to git's rebase.
  
  WWW: https://launchpad.net/bzr-rewrite
  
  PR:             ports/152095
  Submitted by:   Carlo Strub <c-s at c-s.li>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.4111    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +28 -0     ports/devel/bzr-rewrite/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/devel/bzr-rewrite/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/devel/bzr-rewrite/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +43 -0     ports/devel/bzr-rewrite/pkg-plist (new)
